text:
this port is broken (build)

Fix: 

apply patch at http://www.triplan.com:8080/~bs001/web500gw-unbreak.patch

	patch tested by Scott Kenney (saken@hotel.rmta.org)

	because he is unable to maintain this port any longer
How-To-Repeat: 
	
	cd /usr/ports/www/web500gw && make
